text:
http://pkg.FreeBSD.org/FreeBSD:12:i386/quarterly
http://pkg.FreeBSD.org/FreeBSD:12:amd64/quarterly
disappeared

however, 12.4 isn't in unsupported list https://www.freebsd.org/security/unsupported/

moreover, [as I understand] 13.x hasn't some old hardware drivers (e. g. network cards), so upgrade to 13/14 isn't even possible in some cases [my case]
